flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Marian University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 2.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marian University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marian University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.6k → $40.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Marian University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
